data.title: Self-insert
data.solution:
import re

match = re.match(r"^Is ([A-Za-z]+) in the ([A-Za-z]+)\?$", input())
assert match is not None

name = match[1]
place = match[2]
place_cut = len(place) // 2
result = place[:place_cut] + name + place[place_cut:]

print(f"Yes, {name} is in the {result}.")
data.statement:
You are provided with a question such as the following:

{{Is }}[[name]]{{ in the }}[[place]]{{?}}

You must answer with the following format:

{{Yes, }}[[name]]{{ is in the }}[[result]]{{.}}

Where [[result]] is the place with the name inserted in the middle of the place, i.e., given a [[place]] with a length of [[length]]:

* If [[length]] is even, at [[length]]{{ / 2}}; e.g., if the length is {{6}}, the name should be inserted after the {{3}}rd character.
* If [[length]] is odd, at {{(}}[[length]]{{ - 1) / 2}}; e.g., if the length is {{7}}, the name should be inserted after the {{3}}rd character.

For example:

* A [[name]] of {{example}} and a [[place]] of {{London}} gives {{Lonexampledon}}.
* A [[name]] of {{example}} and a [[place]] of {{Paris}} gives {{Paexampleris}}.

Casing must be kept as is.

testCases.title: Lowercase, even
testCases.testOut: Yes, doubt is in the midoubtnd.

testCases.title: Lowercase, even
testCases.testOut: Yes, code is in the procodeject.

testCases.title: Lowercase, odd
testCases.testOut: Yes, value is in the payvaluement.

testCases.title: Lowercase, odd
testCases.testOut: Yes, cargo is in the plcargoane.

testCases.title: Mixed case, even
testCases.testOut: Yes, Brian is in the KitBrianchen.

testCases.title: Mixed case, even
testCases.testOut: Yes, Charles is in the MusCharleseum.

testCases.title: Mixed case, odd
testCases.testOut: Yes, America is in the ReaAmericalITY.

testCases.title: Mixed case, odd
testCases.testOut: Yes, Rick is in the MoRickVIE.

data.stubGenerator:
read question:string(256)
write Yes, <name> is in the <result>.
data.inputDescription: <<First line:>> [[question]], of the format provided above.
data.outputDescription: <<First line:>> [[answer]], of the format provided above.

lastVersion.statementHTML:
Goal

You are provided with a question such as the following:

Is name in the place?

You must answer with the following format:

Yes, name is in the result.

Where result is the place with the name inserted in the middle of the place, i.e., given a place with a length of length:

* If length is even, at length / 2; e.g., if the length is 6, the name should be inserted after the 3rd character.
* If length is odd, at (length - 1) / 2; e.g., if the length is 7, the name should be inserted after the 3rd character.

For example:

* A name of example and a place of London gives Lonexampledon.
* A name of example and a place of Paris gives Paexampleris.

Casing must be kept as is.
Input
First line: question, of the format provided above.
Output
First line: answer, of the format provided above.
Constraints
0 < length(question) < 256

question is an ASCII string.
Example
Input
Is doubt in the mind?
Output
Yes, doubt is in the midoubtnd.
